title: Submission/2026 03 22 Sliding Window + WARMDOWN + AttnRes + PhiSimple (mean 1.1925 BPB)
body:
Mean TTT LoRA val_bpb: 1.1925 (3 seeds: 1337, 42, 7)

  Techniques added on top of the baseline:
  - WARMDOWN_ITERS=20000: always-decaying LR schedule for better int8 quantization
  - Sliding window evaluation (EVAL_STRIDE=64): every token scored with 960+ context
  - Block AttnRes: learned attention over previous block outputs at block boundaries
  - PhiAlpha Simple: per-layer learnable scale on relu² activation

  Built with help from ChatGPT(OpenAI) and Claude (Anthropic). I'm a high school student — this is my first ML competition submission, and first time using that many compute in a project
